FR3-FM-01: verbalize or point to each sound-symbol step
slow the routine to reveal actual pattern use
FR3-FM-02: pair reading and spelling of the same target
immediate shift from one direction to the other
stable target pattern across both forms
FR3-FM-03: new items sharing the same pattern
explicit contrast between known and new items
explain why the same pattern still works
FR3-FM-04: reduce word length while preserving the target pattern
isolate and reinsert the dropped element
verify every part of the pattern is tracked
